member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.ApplySerialCaptureGroupMap.PrimeApplySerialCaptureGroupMapTestMethod
member.summary: Applies a capture group map loaded by TOS at the ".scgm" file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.ApplySerialCaptureGroupMap.PrimeApplySerialCaptureGroupMapTestMethod.CaptureGroupMapName
member.summary: Gets or sets the capture group map name to apply.
